content:
I tried to build a team revolving around Faros' Deep Current (inflict poison everytime tentacle damage is dealt) by pairing her with GMurphy and Mouchette. 

The basic premise is to use Deep Current, change tentacle stance to Raging waves so that each time damage is dealt, tentacles would attack, and spam Mouchette's strike to trigger Raging waves tentacle, and consequently, trigger Deep Current.

But this doesn't happen as expected. I assume the tentacle damage mentioned in Faros Deep Current skill only applies to passive damage from tentacles at the end of a turn? But if not, it should trigger from all source of tentacle damage, including GMurphy's Divine Realm Raging waves stance. I haven't tested this with other sources of tentacle damage such as Caecus OE, Tulu's aftershock, or Murphy's ult but I assume it would be the same. If this is not a bug, shouldn't Faros' Deep Current skill description be more specific regarding what tenracle damage counts?

You absolutely don't right. Dominion orison, all the cards containing "make tentacle do a slap" (As her e2 for example), tentacle gathering, all that stuff works for deep current. I tried it with Aurita exalt + red stance and it worked too... Dunno what's a problem

Now it's being fast. We all see Vortice kit, exalt, her E1 and wheel and thinking. Hmmmm realm mastery hero, intresting, she want eat tentacle, ok. What set we have on RM? Cursed rabit and Returnal line

In our case, only the second option is suitable and it would seem that Tentacle Gathering is something with Tentacle, which means it should work better in Aqua teams? Right? No. You don't care about tentacle hits an extra time, you care about how many tentacle you have but for some reason it's "At the end of the turn make tentacle atack X more time"

And second problem what i wanna rise. Where tentacle generator unit? Outside of OE we have only Miryam rouse, Sanga 4 cost, Tulu exalt and Gmurpy 3 cost. That's not a lot :/ Could be posible to do something with this? I mean maybe posse maybe "4 tentacle gathering = 1 perma tentacle"

I think it would be nice to see what the devs picture a units ideal comp is supposed to be. I'd love like a 2 minute short from the dev acount showing some cool clips of the new unit in action. Ya know killing a big boss dealing big damage or a huge shield or whatever for each new units. It would be nice to have a base line direction for building.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Vortice Ideal Team Comp From the Devs?

content:
Every new unit is met with the same complaints of "I've got no idea where to put her cause ____ is already occupied."

Please make a discount Thais. Any realm. Give a unit a card that can copy any card in hand and grant it retain.

Why:
With newer characters having retainable nuke cards, or status effects. A lot of the old dps's got left far behind. The ability to grant any team some more deck control like that, would be interesting.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Support Kit design suggestion to make D-tide lack less supports.

content: 凭什么徐机制被你们拆成石块强度断腿，到莫丝这里就什么都给了？我很喜欢莫丝，但是你们凭什么这么背刺上一个角色？

Most kill effects like analysis of death aliemus or daff\dore wheels or talents stacking effects etc, are not activated when the enemy is killed by tentacles activated in red stance or by corrosion activation.
Could this possibly be changed? so that, if an active hit activate a tentacle slap, the initiator will receive the kill, same for the activator of the corrosion.
The same thing is probably harder to implement for poison and counter.
But you could just impose that the last unit that directly damaged an enemy is the one that will receive the kill effects on his death, to make the process a lot easier.
thread_title: On kill effects with tentacles and corrosion

content:
Barrier, on the player side, is a powerful effect that is very rare to obtain, only the the chapter buff (important in train), salvador rouse and tawil 1 time effect can grant it.
But it is completely wasted if the enemy use the tentacle mechanic, consuming the block on a single insignificant hit of them, even if the enemy is alone and you cleared all possible mobs.
Could it be changed so that the Barrier is not consumed by the tentacles but just by the actual attack of the enemies?

Daff is a very interesting character with diverse mechanics on her kit, but, with the evolution of the game, she is become less performing as the sole dps of the team, and is normally dependent on staking during a long stage.
I wanted to propose some possible changes to help her be more competitive in the current climate.

- Make so her 1 Cost inflict Vulnerable to all enemies with Leap (when you sacrifice his leap you are not using it on the 3 cost, that will target the lowest health enemy, but this may not be the front row one, wasting the Vulnerable application)
- Give her Final Damage staking on the 3 Cost, not only base damage, possibly with a cap for it (the base damage increase is nice for early game and some basic mobs, but is a lot less impactful for late game and bosses, where the STR scaling will make more of an impact, making her a lot more reliant on her exalt cards to perform)
- Possibly upgrade the 4 Cost variant of her exalt card, it is the most costly but the damage increase and scaling is not that much bigger than the 2 cost, and has no secondary interaction with poison and counter, that normally expand the potential damage of those cards in a significant way.

Some extra points:
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1479040225685798932/1479286581788545045

Some Daff players have opinions or further suggestions to add?
